mapper.select: SELECT * FROM project_config_file WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY is_primary DESC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_config_file (project_id, file_name, relative_path, is_primary, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{fileName}, #{relativePath}, #{isPrimary}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
